landing.heroSubtitle: Academic-grade AI vision engineered for real-time biomarker analysis in high-humidity environments.
landing.moduleDescription: Three specialized AI pipelines working in concert to deliver laboratory-grade freshness analysis on consumer hardware.
landing.readyDescription: Deploy laboratory-grade freshness analysis directly to your mobile device. No subscription. No cloud dependency.
landing.dualStreamDesc: Simultaneous processing of specular reflection and biological texture for high-humidity environments.
landing.explainableAIDesc: Don't just trust a grade. See highlighted markers on the gills, eyes, and scales in real-time.
landing.crowdsourcedDesc: Live freshness heatmaps across local markets powered by anonymized user metadata.
landing.scanBodyDesc: Position camera 15cm from specimen. Use ambient light or built-in strobe.
landing.targetBiomarkersDesc: AI identifies gill saturation, corneal clarity, and epidermal tension.
landing.getGradeDesc: Instant Freshness Index (0-100) generated with storage recommendations.

faq.q1: How does the dual-stream AI model work?
faq.a1: FreshScan uses two specialized neural networks in parallel. Stream A (MobileNetV2) analyzes the full fish body for overall freshness classification while Stream B (BiomarkerCNN) inspects micro-regions like eyes and gills. Their outputs are fused to produce the final Freshness Index.
faq.q2: What do the freshness grades mean?
faq.a2: The Freshness Index (0–100) maps to letter grades: A+ (≥92), A (≥80), B (≥65), C (≥50), D (<50). Higher scores indicate better preservation and longer safe storage windows.
faq.q3: What is Auto-Scan mode vs. manual scan?
faq.a3: Auto-Scan accepts a single photo and runs validation and both model streams automatically. Manual scan allows uploading separate Body, Eye, and Gill images for a more granular assessment.
faq.a4: Grad-CAM produces a heatmap that highlights image regions that influenced the model's prediction, helping you see which features (gills, eyes, scales) contributed most to the grade.
faq.a5: The Trust Map is a live, crowdsourced heatmap of vendor freshness aggregated from anonymized scans, helping you find consistently high-quality sellers.
